name: Chef Nichol's Steak Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound steaks between two pieces of waxed paper until evenly thickened to 1/4 inch.
2. Dredge each steak in flour mixed with salt and pepper.
3. In a large skillet, melt one tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
4. Add the steaks; brown on each side for about one minute, then remove them to a platter.
5. Spread mustard and Worcestershire sauce onto both sides of the steaks; set aside.
6. In the same skillet, melt the remaining butter.
7. Add mushrooms and shallots; sauté for two minutes.
8. Add brandy and cook until it begins to flame gently.
9. Stir in beef broth and remaining Worcestershire sauce, cooking until hot.
10. Return steaks to the skillet and reheat for an additional two minutes.
11. Sprinkle with parsley if desired. (Optional: Use cubed or individual portions of flank steak instead.)
